ideation: This sequence animates the act of playing a flute. The right arm will hold the flute horizontally, while the left arm will subtly support the instrument.  The frames will show the start of a note, the note held, and then the note released.  Both arms will return to a resting position. Since the robot has no fingers, the flute will be held by a simple grasp, implied by the arm position. Frame 1 will show the right arm lifting to playing position, the left arm will be down. Frame 2 will show both arms in the playing position, the right arm holding the flute level, the left arm slightly below supporting the flute. Frame 3 will be a transition away from the playing position; the right arm will move slightly up and away from the flute, the left arm will move away to the side. Frame 4 both arms will return to rest.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to play
right arm lifts to hold the flute, left arm supports
both arms hold the flute steady, a note is played
arms release the flute and return to rest
